HRT.name: Hortus Station
HRT._note: Keplerian fit from 209 origin samples spanning full orbit including periapsis. FIO a and e confirmed by observed r_peri=45347.8km matching FIO prediction exactly. Mean error 1.38km, p95 2.28km, max 2.40km. Held-out validation (6 post-1782626000 samples) 2.2-2.4km. Previous provisional fit (8 apoapsis-only samples, e=0.071) retired. Fitted 2026-06-28 chat session.

ANT.name: Antares Station
ANT._note: Keplerian refit 2026-06-29. a_m=33603417km (FIO SemiMajorAxis/1000, in metres). 2022 samples, 98% coverage. Analytical linear fit of unwrapped angle vs time, then nonlinear refinement. Intrinsic data scatter ~39km (likely docking position spread). Mean 39.5km, p95 63.9km, max 78.6km. Previous entry had a_m=33603.4 (wrong: divided FIO by 1e6 not 1e3). Station orbits at 33.6M km from star.

MOR.name: Moria Station
MOR._note: Keplerian fit 2026-06-29. a_m=198222970km (FIO/1000). 599 samples, 13% coverage (3.3 days of 26.7-day period). Position accurate near epoch 2026-06-29 but degrades for dates far from capture window. Mean 2.17M km, p95 3.3M km — limited by arc coverage. n from analytical angle regression near periapsis. More capture data needed for reliable predictions.
